summary_en: 1,500,000 shares (3.77% of issued shares excl. treasury) up to ¥1,500M via ToSTNeT-3 on 31 May 2024 before 08:00 JST. Rationale: capital efficiency and opportunistic capital allocation.
title_en: Notice regarding acquisition of treasury shares and purchase via self-tender offer (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Mandarake Inc. filed notice on 31 May 2024 of a decision by electronic resolution to acquire treasury shares via self-tender offer (ToSTNeT-3). The company will place a purchase order at the close of trading on 31 May 2024 (including the final special dividend) at the Tokyo Stock Exchange, with the order effective only during the exchange's trading hours and not subject to modification. The acquisition is limited to a maximum of 1,500,000 common shares (3.77% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) up to a total value of ¥1,500 million. The rationale is to improve capital efficiency and implement opportunistic capital policies. Results will be disclosed after trading closes on 31 May 2024 at 08:00 JST.
